fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-margin-guard-enabled", "false") == "true")">
            
            <set-variable name="mgCustomerId" value="@{
                var payload = (Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-jwt-payload", null);
                var fromJwt = payload == null ? null
                    : (payload["customer_id"]?.ToString() ?? payload["sub"]?.ToString());
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(fromJwt)) return fromJwt;
                // Fallback: APIM-managed subscription id (set by subscription-key validation).
                return context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : "";
            }" />
            <set-variable name="mgTenantId" value="@{
                var payload = (Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-jwt-payload", null);
                var fromJwt = payload?["tenant_id"]?.ToString();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(fromJwt)) return fromJwt;
                // Fallback: admin-pinned Named Value.
                return context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-tenant-id", "");
            }" />

            
                <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("mgCustomerId", "") != "" && context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("mgTenantId", "") != "")">

                    
                    

                    
                        
                            
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                @($"{context.Variables["aforo-margin-guard-url"]}/internal/v1/margin-guard/quick-check?tenantId={context.Variables["mgTenantId"]}&scopeType=CUSTOMER&scopeId={context.Variables["mgCustomerId"]}")
                                GET
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                
                                    @((string)context.Variables["mgTenantId"])
                                
                            

                            
                                
                                    <set-variable name="mgResult" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["mgResponse"]).Body.As())" />
                                    
                                    
                                
                                
                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    
                        
                        <when condition="@{
                            var json = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["mgResult"]);
                            return json.Value("allowed") == false && json.Value("level") == "L3_BLOCK";
                        }">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                
                                    blocked
                                
                                
                                    L3
                                
                                
                                    @{
                                        var json = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["mgResult"]);
                                        return json.Value("retryAfterSeconds")?.ToString() ?? "1800";
                                    }
                                
                                @{
                                    var json = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["mgResult"]);
                                    var retryAfter = json.Value("retryAfterSeconds") ?? 1800;
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("code", "SERVICE_RESTRICTED_MARGIN"),
                                            new JProperty("message", json.Value("message") ?? "Service restricted due to margin constraints."),
                                            new JProperty("retryAfterSeconds", retryAfter),
                                            new JProperty("supportUrl", "/portal/support")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        

                        
                        <when condition="@{
                            var json = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["mgResult"]);
                            if (json.Value("allowed") == false && json.Value("level") == "L2_THROTTLE") {
                                var throttleRate = json.Value("throttleRate") ?? 50;
                                var roll = new Random().Next(100);
                                return roll >= throttleRate;
                            }
                            return false;
                        }">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                
                                    throttled
                                
                                
                                    L2
                                
                                
                                    60
                                
                                {"error":{"code":"RATE_LIMITED_MARGIN","message":"Rate limited due to margin constraints. Please retry.","retryAfterSeconds":60,"dashboardUrl":"/portal/cost-explorer"}}
